text: I feel a sense of curiosity and anticipation moving from the bright, sterile corridor into this vibrant, thought-provoking exhibition space. The transition between the minimalist glass and metal of the hallway and the imaginative, colorful 'R+D' wall draws my attention to the contrasts between order and creativity, control and exploration. Here, surrounded by displays about the intersection of humanity and technology, I am reminded of the perpetual tension and symbiosis between the known and the possible. I feel both a participant and an observer, reflecting on how environments can shape thinking and questioning.
